issues.title: RedisVectorStoreAutoConfiguration config failed with multi embeddingmodels
issues.body:
**Bug description**
Import spring-ai-starter-vector-store-redis and then RedisVectorStoreAutoConfiguration config failed.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/dbbd971f-00ae-4d4e-8878-8d4e55456917)

I need Ollama and OpenAI at the same time. 

How to config embedding model, I only need OpenAI embedding model.

**Environment**
Spring AI 1.0.0

**Steps to reproduce**
my project's pom.xml:

```
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-ai-starter-model-ollama</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-ai-starter-model-openai</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-ai-starter-vector-store-redis</artifactId>
        </dependency>
```

this three starters can not import at the same time.

**Expected behavior**
I known both Ollama and OpenAI has auto config embedding model. This may not useful for my project.

comments.body:
Hi @chenm202501 

You can use the following configuration:

```yaml
spring:
  ai:
    model:
      embedding: openai
```

> Hi [@chenm202501](https://github.com/chenm202501)
> 
> You can use the following configuration:
> 
> spring:
>   ai:
>     model:
>       embedding: openai

thanks!
